features: An oriental fragrance developed to stimulate the body
Fruity, oriental fragrance enriched with guarana
The 3-in-1 formula nourishes the body, cleanses the face and nourishes the hair
Dermatologically tested and pH balanced formula for everyday use
description: Product Description The real sports brand for men and women offers the best, most complete range of personal care products to make you feel on top - 24/7, all year round and in any situation. The adidas Body Care unlocks your full potential, whether you like, love or live during sports. Get ready. The adidas 3-in-1 shower creams are outstanding body care solutions that meet all your expectations and needs. This shower cream is designed to simplify your daily shower routine and get you ready to take on any challenge. The Adidas Victory League Shower Gel has been specially designed to provide you with a high-quality personal care product that is easy and efficient to use, with 3-in-1 technology that gives you complete and versatile care for the three head areas of your body. It cleans and washes the face, provides the necessary moisture and leaves a fresh feeling as well as healthy and shiny skin. It cleanses and nourishes the hair, removes excess oil and refreshes the scalp. It also has a non-drying formula, moisturises and cleanses your body and makes your skin vibrant and comfortable. The Adidas Victory League 3-in-1 shower gel has been developed with guarana extracts and an oriental, masculine fragrance with stimulating and invigorating effect. The versatile cleansing formula and its unique fragrance qualities make the Adidas Victory League the perfect shower cream for confident men who believe that both individual achievements and teamwork will lead to success. Ingredients Aqua/Water/Eau, Sodium C14-16 Olefin Sulfonate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Chloride, Parfum/Fragrance, Sodium Benzoate, Citric Acid, Disodium EDTA, Menthol, Glycerin, Paullinia Cupana Seed Extract, Butylene Glycol, Yellow 5 (CI 19140), Yellow 60), Yellow 6 (CI 155 99 85).
